final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from the Legend of Sword and Fairy IP.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style character design, soft rounded forms, expressive stylized proportions
Composition: 3x3 grid layout with 9 equal panels, each panel showing a bust portrait framed identically, consistent head size and positioning across all cells
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair, round wire-rimmed glasses, peeking through a torn hole in white paper in every panel, varying expressions and outfits per panel
Scene/backdrop: plain white torn paper with irregular hole edges as the unifying framing device, neutral soft gray background behind paper
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from upper left, gentle shadows, warm and approachable mood, consistent across all 9 panels
Color palette: each panel anchored by distinct outfit color (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against neutral paper/background
Materials/textures: smooth Pixar-style skin rendering, fabric textures for sweaters/jackets/hoodies, subtle paper fiber texture on torn edges
Constraints: all 9 panels must share identical framing (torn paper hole), consistent character identity, recognizable as Zhao Ling'er homage without direct copyright infringement
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, anime/manga style, watermarks, text overlays, inconsistent lighting between panels, deformed facial features, cluttered backgrounds
